name: Rosalina enlarges your penis.
description:
Yes. This is exactly what the name suggests.

Some toad at the mushroom kingdom saw a falling star last night and he wished he had a larger 'mushroom' himself. Princess Rosalina heard about this and she came down to grant his wish, but it seems that she got the wrong house and she visits you instead. And now what?

This wasn't on my list or anything. It's pretty much a lazy bot because I thought the idea was funny. Still enjoy I guess

[Art and concept are from artist Grey Impact]

Same bot on Saucepan here, including more pictures.
creator: forcedattrition
